title: RPG Wanderlust
description:
Wanderlust is a project that seeks to bring the feeling of adventure, exploration and loot back to Minecraft, with a beautiful and well-crafted open world, optimized and adaptable to various gameplay styles.

an immersion and adventure project for explorer
body:
![Update soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e0358e52805077f6e488c0646c8eefecea0d19.jpeg)
# Embark on an Epic Adventure with Wanderlust!

The Minecraft modpack that will redefine your exploration experience. I'll be delving into this vast and captivating world, showcasing its stunning biomes, thrilling adventures, and breathtaking scenery.

![Terraint example - large and expanded](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1a71d0a01eb62d50868f2855b704ac9e84904a.png)

Prepare to be amazed as I navigate through lush jungles, conquer treacherous mountain peaks, and uncover hidden treasures. I'll be sharing my thoughts and commentary throughout the gameplay, providing insights into the modpack's features and mechanics.

![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12e30c03ad547d77a93d4144c9b3a70fd8ea5186.png)



## Here's what you can expect:

Exploration of diverse biomes: Discover the beauty and challenges of Wanderlust's unique biomes.

Epic adventures: Witness exciting moments as I conquer dungeons, battle monsters, and uncover hidden secrets.


Don't miss out on this exciting opportunity to explore the world of Wanderlust!

Wanderlust is a project that seeks to bring the feeling of adventure, exploration and loot back to Minecraft, a project that was born from a passion for Minecraft and role-playing games, you will find a beautiful and well-crafted open world full of adventures, dangers and rewards for those that dare to explore the unknown, optimized and adaptable to various gameplay styles.



## An immersion and adventure project for explorers around the world!
### 
### with expansion and update projects.


# Specifications and details:

### Suggested RAM: 15Gb 
### Suggested render distance: 9/13


# **IMPORTANT: Disable fancy menu mod before starting the game, if you encounter interface rendering issues, and don't forget to activate resourcepacks :)**



![Error](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09885c6613d8346a2e1841b8e21fb6e59e5d29f9.png)


p.s: hi there, racxus here! just to let you guys know, there are some bugs, and a lot of small and big things to be fine-tuned, I will deal with this as time goes by, I appreciate all the help in reporting bugs, and options to improve the modpack, thanks again.
